mapper.sql: scId, storeId, grade, headImgUrl, coachName, phone, sex, address, identity, employTime, diplomaImgUrl, identBackImgUrl, identImgUrl, salary, level, status, createdDate
mapper.insert: insert into store_coach (scId, storeId, grade, headImgUrl, coachName, phone, sex, address, identity, employTime, diplomaImgUrl, identBackImgUrl, identImgUrl, salary, level, status, createdDate, introduce ) values (#{scId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{storeId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{grade,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{headImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{coachName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sex,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{address,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{identity,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{employTime,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{diplomaImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{identBackImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{identImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{salary,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{level,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{introduce,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} )

insert into store_coach
scId,
storeId,
grade,
headImgUrl,
coachName,
phone,
sex,
address,
identity,
employTime,
diplomaImgUrl,
identBackImgUrl,
identImgUrl,
salary,
level,
status,
createdDate,
introduce,
#{scId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{storeId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{grade,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{headImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{coachName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{sex,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{address,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{identity,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{employTime,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{diplomaImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{identBackImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{identImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{salary,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{level,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
#{status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{introduce,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update store_coach
storeId = #{storeId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
grade = #{grade,jdbcType=INTEGER},
headImgUrl = #{headImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
coachName = #{coachName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
phone = #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sex = #{sex,jdbcType=INTEGER},
address = #{address,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
identity = #{identity,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
employTime = #{employTime,jdbcType=INTEGER},
diplomaImgUrl = #{diplomaImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
identBackImgUrl = #{identBackImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
identImgUrl = #{identImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
salary = #{salary,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
level = #{level,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
createdDate = #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
introduce = #{introduce,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
where scId = #{scId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update store_coach set storeId = #{storeId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, grade = #{grade,jdbcType=INTEGER}, headImgUrl = #{headImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, coachName = #{coachName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, phone = #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sex = #{sex,jdbcType=INTEGER}, address = #{address,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, identity = #{identity,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, employTime = #{employTime,jdbcType=INTEGER}, diplomaImgUrl = #{diplomaImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, identBackImgUrl = #{identBackImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, identImgUrl = #{identImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, salary = #{salary,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, level = #{level,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, createdDate = #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, introduce = #{introduce,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} where scId = #{scId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update store_coach set storeId = #{storeId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, grade = #{grade,jdbcType=INTEGER}, headImgUrl = #{headImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, coachName = #{coachName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, phone = #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sex = #{sex,jdbcType=INTEGER}, address = #{address,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, identity = #{identity,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, employTime = #{employTime,jdbcType=INTEGER}, diplomaImgUrl = #{diplomaImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, identBackImgUrl = #{identBackImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, identImgUrl = #{identImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, salary = #{salary,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, level = #{level,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, createdDate = #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where scId = #{scId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: SELECT c.scId as coachId,c.coachName,c.grade,c.level, c.headImgUrl, c.introduce FROM store_coach c WHERE c.storeId = #{storeId} and c.status=1 ORDER BY c.level DESC
SELECT c.scId as coachId, c.headImgUrl, c.grade, c.diplomaImgUrl, c.coachName, c.level, c.introduce FROM store_coach c WHERE c.scId = #{coachId}
